Privacy Policy

Privacy Policy

This site is a personal, static blog hosted on GitHub Pages.

What data is collected

  • No account or user profile data is collected on this site.
  • No first-party analytics or tracking cookies are used by default.
  • Standard web server request logs may be processed by infrastructure providers (for example, GitHub Pages) to operate and secure the service.

Third-party links

Posts may link to external websites. Those sites have their own privacy policies and practices.

Contact

For privacy questions, contact: dracul01@gmail.com.
